zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Waterton於大約1401年出生在英國越可爾梅瑟利時，她的父親Robert Waterton51歲，母親Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham40歲。她於1427年8月15日與Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby在英國越可爾梅瑟利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年10月18日之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Waterton于大约1401年出生在英国越可爾梅瑟利时，她的父亲Robert Waterton51岁，母亲Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham40岁。她于1427年8月15日与Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby在英国越可爾梅瑟利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年10月18日之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Waterton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Waterton was born about 1401, in Methley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Waterton, was 51 and her mother, Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham, was 40. She married Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby on 15 August 1427, in Methley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died after 18 October 1434, in her hometown, and was buried in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Waterton est née environ 1401, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Waterton, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan Cecily Fleming d’Everingham, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby le 15 août 1427, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 18 octobre 1434, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Waterton um 1401 in Methley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Waterton 51 und ihre Mutter Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham 40. Sie hat am 15. August 1427 in Methley, Yorkshire, England Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 18. Oktober 1434 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Waterton è nata il circa 1401 nel Methley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Waterton, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby il 15 agosto 1427, nel Methley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 18 ottobre 1434, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Watertonが約1401年にイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーで生まれた時，父Robert Watertonは51歳，母Joan Cecily Fleming de Everinghamは40歳であった。1427年8月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーでSir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年10月18日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Waterton(이)가 대략 1401년 영국 요르크실르 멧h리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Waterton(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1427년 8월 15일 영국 요르크실르 멧h리에서 Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 10월 18일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Waterton nasceu aproximadamente 1401, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Waterton, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby em 15 de agosto de 1427, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 18 de outubro de 1434, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: белло вит клеитаурп анд аби анд гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Waterton родилась около 1401 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Waterton было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby 15 августа 1427 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 18 октябрь 1434 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Waterton nació aproximadamente 1401, en Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Waterton, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Lionel Welles Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby el 15 de agosto de 1427, en Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió después de 18 de octubre de 1434, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
